message:
fix(net/dns): clamp negative TTL to configured min/max bounds

put_negative_ip_no_records() passed negative_ttl directly to
put_ip_entry() without calling clamp_ttl(), unlike put_ip() which
always clamps. This allowed negative_ttl > max_ttl to persist
entries longer than the configured maximum.

Fixed by routing through clamp_ttl(). Test updated to set min_ttl
low enough for the 10ms negative_ttl test case.

Also records 10-file audit of DNS, QUIC, and plan modules.
Session total: 145 files, 9 bugs fixed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
